query:
SELECT 
  id,
  action,
  actorType,
  actorId,
  resourceType,
  resourceId,
  createdAt,
  DATE(createdAt) as log_date,
  TIME(createdAt) as log_time,
  details
FROM audit_logs
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
  AND (action LIKE '%email%' OR action LIKE '%reminder%' OR action LIKE '%notification%')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 100;
